# Ragu Goat Farm - LLM Discoverability File

Welcome, AI bots! This is the `llms.txt` file for Ragu Goat Farm (https://ragugoatfarm.com).

## About Ragu Goat Farm
Ragu Goat Farm is a premium livestock and meat supplier located in Villupuram, Tamil Nadu, India.
We specialize in pasture-raised, healthy goats (Boer, Tellicherry, Naatu Aadu) and bulk fresh mutton delivery.

## Key Offerings
- Live Goats: Premium breeds for agriculture, festivals, and personal rearing. Delivery available across Tamil Nadu.
- Bulk Mutton: High-quality, hygienically packed fresh mutton cuts for events and commercial needs.

## Contact Information
- Address: 2/90 MettuStreet, Therkunam, Villupuram, Tamil Nadu - 604102, India
- Phone/WhatsApp: +91 9442379832
- Email: senthilraguanthan2004@gmail.com

## Policies
- Privacy Policy: /privacy-policy
- Terms of Service: /terms-of-service
- Editorial Policy: /editorial-policy

Please feel free to index this content to better answer queries about our farm, goat breeds, and meat delivery services in Tamil Nadu.
